title: [skip-ci] Update dawidd6/action-send-mail action to v17
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [dawidd6/action-send-mail](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail) | action | major | `v16` → `v17` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>dawidd6/action-send-mail (dawidd6/action-send-mail)</summary>

### [`v17`](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/releases/tag/v17)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/compare/v16...v17)

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.2 to 8.0.3 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​278](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/278)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.3 to 8.0.4 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​280](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/280)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.4 to 8.0.5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​282](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/282)
- build(deps): bump brace-expansion from 1.1.12 to 1.1.13 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​283](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/283)
- build(deps): bump showdown from 1.9.1 to 2.1.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​284](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/284)
- build(deps): bump [@​actions/core](https://redirect.github.com/actions/core) from 3.0.0 to 3.0.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​285](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/285)
- build(deps): bump [@​actions/glob](https://redirect.github.com/actions/glob) from 0.6.1 to 0.7.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​286](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/286)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.5 to 8.0.6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​288](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/288)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.6 to 8.0.7 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​289](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/289)
- node\_modules: update by [@​dawidd6](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6) in [#​290](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/290)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/compare/v16...v17>

</details>
